reading: Over 154 days of real data (ETH fell — 100% mETH -44.2%), the Noetrix ensemble returned -9.2% at a -11.0% max drawdown — beating the best single forecaster (EWMA-Vol: -37.6%, DD -41.4%) and every risk-on baseline by de-risking as its agents disagreed. It did NOT beat a permanently-safe 100% USDY (1.5%) in this down market — just as it would not beat 100% mETH in a pure bull run. The edge is that it does not need to know the regime in advance.
